name: arespollo--grok-research
description: Crypto research via Grok model's real-time X/Twitter knowledge. Forwards the user's query as-is to Grok API — no prompt injection, no context bloat. Use when: (1) user asks to research a token's narrative/story/sentiment, (2) user says "调研", "research", "grok research", "查一下叙事", "帮我看看这个币", (3) user wants to know what CT is saying about a token/project. NOT for: price analysis, on-chain data, or trading execution.
